title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four Claude Code projects designed to accelerate productivity: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an internal operating system. The content emphasizes hands-on building over passive tutorial consumption.
